title: CleanView
description: Removes/No Potion Particles On Your Screen
body:
**CleanView**
**FAQ**

**What does this pack do/What are the features?/Why would I want this?**

This resource pack is designed to provide a cleaner, a better, and immersive gameplay experience by completely removing potion particle effects from your point of view (POV). Whether you're using invisibility for stealth, swiftness for speed, or any other potion effect, the distracting swirls and visual clutters that normally surround your screen will no longer be visible—making it perfect for PvP, recordings, or simply enhancing your overall visual clarity during gameplay. This allows you to maintain all potion benefits without the annoyance of on-screen particles. Simple, effective, and fully compatible with most versions of Minecraft, this resource pack is a must-have for players who value visual precision and want a more balanced performance expierience.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
**---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**
(NO OPTIFINE NEEDED!)(LEGAL, DO NOT STEAL OR MAKE ANY MODIFICATIONS TO THIS MOD AND MAKE IT YOUR OWN, THIS BELONGS TO skai6214 AND skai6214 ONLY.)
